scope.summary: Documents the online per-client credential lifecycle and proves its rotation, revocation, stale-generation, and OAuth-expiry admission contracts.
out_of_scope: A live remote control-listener or Oracle database run.
Cancellation of an OAuth request after it has already been authenticated and dispatched; the documented contract is admission-time validation.

entry_points.name: authorized online client-credential operator routes
entry_points.trace: scripts/resource_budget.sh --profile test --run-id b4-credential-lifecycle-lavendertern -- cargo test -p oraclemcp-core operator_client_credentials_screen_lists_rotates_revokes_without_token_leak: 1 passed. The route durably rotates while a client session is live, removes only that session and its SSE buffer, rejects the old bearer, accepts the replacement at generation 2, and forwards generation 2 to the stateful lifecycle.

entry_points.name: stateful credential-generation admission barrier
entry_points.trace: scripts/resource_budget.sh --profile test --run-id b4-credential-lifecycle-lavendertern -- cargo test -p oraclemcp-core revocation_generation_floor_invalidates_concurrent_inflight_creation: 1 passed. A request authenticated before revoke/rotate but paused during lane creation is refused and cannot leak a lane after the generation floor is installed.

entry_points.name: OAuth access-token expiry at HTTP admission
entry_points.trace: scripts/resource_budget.sh --profile test --run-id b4-oauth-expiry-lavendertern -- cargo test -p oraclemcp-auth expired_token_is_rejected: 1 passed. The resource-server validator rejects a JWT whose exp has passed; operations documentation records that this check occurs when each HTTP request is authenticated.

limitations: No live listener, remote control ingress, or Oracle database execution is claimed; the close is backed by deterministic scoped tests.
OAuth exp is validated at request admission. This close does not claim an in-progress handler is interrupted after that admission boundary.
The full workspace quality gate was not run for this source commit.
